problems.title: Your First C++ Program
problems.instructions:
Write a C++ program that prints the text below.

```
Hello, C++!
```

Your program should output exactly this line.

{hints: Use `std::cout` from the `<iostream>` library.}

problems.title: Print Two Lines
problems.instructions:
Print the following two lines.

```
C++ is powerful
C++ is fast
```

Each line should appear exactly as shown.

{hints: Use two `std::cout` statements.}

tests.expected_stdout:
C++ is powerful
C++ is fast

problems.title: Read and Print a Number
problems.instructions:
Write a program that reads an integer and prints it.

Example:

Input: 5
Output: 5

```
5
```

{hints: Use `std::cin`.}

problems.title: Add Two Numbers
problems.instructions:
Read two integers and print their sum.

Example:

```
Input
3 4

Output
7
```

{hints: Store values in two variables and add them.}

problems.title: Multiply Two Numbers
problems.instructions:
Read two integers and print their product.

```
Input
3 5

Output
15
```

{hints: Use the `*` operator.}

problems.title: Echo a Word
problems.instructions:
Read a single word and print it.

Example:

Input: hello
Output: hello

```
hello
```

{hints: Use `std::string`.}

problems.title: Print Numbers 1 to 5
problems.instructions:
Print numbers from 1 to 5, one per line.

```
1
2
3
4
5
```

{hints: Use a `for` loop.}

problems.title: Check Even or Odd
problems.instructions:
Read an integer.

Print `even` if the number is even, otherwise print `odd`.

Example:

```
Input
4

Output
even
```

{hints: Use the `%` operator.}

problems.title: Find the Larger Number
problems.instructions:
Read two integers and print the larger one.

```
Input
4 9

Output
9
```

{hints: Use an `if` statement.}

problems.title: Sum of Three Numbers
problems.instructions:
Read three integers and print their sum.

```
Input
1 2 3

Output
6
```

{hints: Store the values in three variables.}

problems.title: Count to N
problems.instructions:
Read an integer `N` and print numbers from 1 to `N`.

Example:

```
Input
3

Output
1
2
3
```

{hints: Loop from 1 to N.}

problems.title: Square a Number
problems.instructions:
Read an integer and print its square.

```
Input
4

Output
16
```

{hints: Multiply the number by itself.}

problems.title: Print a Greeting
problems.instructions:
Read a name and print a greeting.

```
Input
Alice

Output
Hello Alice
```

{hints: Print two pieces of text with `<<`.}

problems.title: Absolute Value
problems.instructions:
Read an integer and print its absolute value.

```
Input
-5

Output
5
```

{hints: If the number is negative, multiply by -1.}

problems.title: Sum 1 to N
problems.instructions:
Read an integer `N` and print the sum of numbers from 1 to `N`.

```
Input
4

Output
10
```

{hints: Use a loop and accumulate the sum.}
